nodes.name: Config Sources
nodes.notes: PLUGIN CONFIG: Add/remove seminar types here

nodes.name: Loop Over Sources
nodes.notes: Processes one source config at a time

nodes.name: Fetch CSV (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: URL comes from Config Sources — no need to edit

nodes.name: Parse & Transform Data
nodes.notes: Config-driven column mapping from Config Sources

nodes.name: Read State Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Set your State Sheet URL

parameters.query:
SELECT input1.*
FROM input1
LEFT JOIN input2 ON input1.event_hash_id = input2.event_hash_id
WHERE input2.event_hash_id IS NULL

nodes.name: Idempotency Filter (New Events Only)
nodes.notes: LEFT JOIN + WHERE NULL: only new events pass through

nodes.name: Has New Events?
nodes.notes: Filters out empty items. If no valid items, downstream nodes won't execute.

nodes.name: Create Google Calendar Event
nodes.notes: Runs FIRST (before Telegram). Output provides htmlLink for Calendar invite.

nodes.name: Merge Calendar + Data
nodes.notes: Combines original event data with Google Calendar htmlLink

nodes.name: Telegram Broadcast
nodes.notes: Receives calendar link from Merge node. HTML parse mode for clean formatting.

nodes.name: Update State Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Set your State Sheet URL. Runs after Telegram — has all data + calendar_link.
